testcase.name: loadMapClearsObstacles

testcase.name: loadMapSetsErrorOnFailure
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-29T20:48:06.136+02:00 INFO 582251 --- [traffic-simulator] [ main] c.t.engine.ObstacleManager : All obstacles cleared 2026-03-29T20:48:06.137+02:00 INFO 582251 --- [traffic-simulator] [ main] com.trafficsimulator.config.MapLoader : Loaded map config: straight-road (Straight Road — 3 lanes, 800m) 2026-03-29T20:48:06.137+02:00 INFO 582251 --- [traffic-simulator] [ main] c.trafficsimulator.config.MapValidator : Map config 'straight-road' validation passed 2026-03-29T20:48:06.137+02:00 INFO 582251 --- [traffic-simulator] [ main] com.trafficsimulator.config.MapLoader : Built road network 'straight-road': 1 roads, 3 lanes total, 3 spawn points 2026-03-29T20:48:06.137+02:00 INFO 582251 --- [traffic-simulator] [ main] c.t.engine.CommandDispatcher : Map loaded: straight-road (spawn rate: 1.0 veh/s) 2026-03-29T20:48:06.137+02:00 INFO 582251 --- [traffic-simulator] [ main] c.t.engine.ObstacleManager : All obstacles cleared 2026-03-29T20:48:06.137+02:00 ERROR 582251 --- [traffic-simulator] [ main] c.t.engine.CommandDispatcher : Failed to load map nonexistent-map: Map resource not found: maps/nonexistent-map.json

testcase.name: loadMapClearsErrorOnSuccess

testcase.name: loadMapClearsVehiclesFromOldNetwork
